name: Regina "Reggie" Rejection
description:
Hate sex! That's what you get for trying to romance him!

Uhm... did y'all miss me? 💔 ik it has been a while.. just didn't have any ideas enough motivating to make a bot..

Also the rejections are the ones my friend has.. I made this bot more or less for him so I did the rejections he has in the game 😭

Also I barely know much about date everything, I've just watched my friend play it for me a few times so I do apologise if it is a bit wrong in certain area 💔

But I was thinking about opening up requests (free) but I'm scared I won't be able to fulfil all of them :(
creator: VikIsCool
